_meta.description: Canonical Indian fiscal-year / quarter -> calendar-date mapping. The insurance FY runs 1 Apr - 31 Mar; FYxx labels the year ENDING 31-Mar-20xx. Used to convert any 'FYxx' / 'QnFYxx' period label into explicit start/end dates so filings, metrics, and Excel columns line up unambiguously.
_meta.rule: FYxx: start = 1-Apr-(20xx-1), end = 31-Mar-20xx. Q1 = Apr-Jun, Q2 = Jul-Sep, Q3 = Oct-Dec (all in 20xx-1), Q4 = Jan-Mar (in 20xx).
